headline: UBS Maintains Buy on First Solar, Raises Price Target to $330
summary: UBS  analyst Jon Windham   maintains First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) with a Buy and raises the price target from $290 to $330.

headline: First Solar: Buy The Pullback Before 2027 Gets Priced In

headline: Is First Solar Stock Outperforming the S&P 500?
summary: First Solar has outperformed the S&P 500 Index over the past year, and analysts remain moderately bullish about the stock’s growth prospects.

headline: First Solar: Priced As If Subsidy Never Ends
summary: First Solar's profitability is heavily reliant on Section 45X tax credits, which comprised 76%-86% of gross margin. Read why FSLR stock is a Sell.
